# Fraudforce

## FraudForce attributes

Attributes describing a FraudForce risk assessment.

| Attribute | Type | Description | Examples | Stability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| <a id="fpcc-fraudforce-score" href="#fpcc-fraudforce-score">`fpcc.fraudforce.score`</a> | int | The fraud risk score returned by the FraudForce engine. [1] | `-3`; `0`; `5` | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) |

**[1] `fpcc.fraudforce.score`:** A negative score indicates higher risk. Typically ranges from -10 to 10.
